001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
004
005/**
006 * Projection that aggregates egg counts for a single batch.
007 *
008 * <p>Each instance contains the batch ID, the total number of eggs,
009 * and the number of eggs currently marked as viable.
010 */
011public class BatchEggAggregate {
012
013  @ColumnInfo(name = "batchId")
014  private long batchId;
015
016  @ColumnInfo(name = "totalCount")
017  private int totalCount;
018
019  @ColumnInfo(name = "viableCount")
020  private int viableCount;
021
022  /**
023   * Returns the ID of the batch for this aggregate.
024   *
025   * @return batch ID.
026   */
027  public long getBatchId() { return batchId; }
028
029  /**
030   * Sets the ID of the batch for this aggregate.
031   *
032   * @param batchId batch ID.
033   */
034  public void setBatchId(long batchId) { this.batchId = batchId; }
035
036  /**
037   * Returns the total number of eggs in the batch.
038   *
039   * @return total egg count.
040   */
041  public int getTotalCount() { return totalCount; }
042
043  /**
044   * Sets the total number of eggs in the batch.
045   *
046   * @param totalCount total egg count.
047   */
048  public void setTotalCount(int totalCount) { this.totalCount = totalCount; }
049
050  /**
051   * Returns the number of viable eggs in the batch.
052   *
053   * @return viable egg count.
054   */
055  public int getViableCount() { return viableCount; }
056
057  /**
058   * Sets the number of viable eggs in the batch.
059   *
060   * @param viableCount viable egg count.
061   */
062  public void setViableCount(int viableCount) { this.viableCount = viableCount; }
063}
